entry.title: 姚老师的共读时光・Reading Together with Teacher Yeow
entry.content:
短视频教孩子刷，AI 帮孩子写，但没有人教孩子 —— 想。

每次一小时，姚老师陪孩子读一段经典文学，用华语说出自己的想法，再用 AI 协同创作，以锻炼思辨技能、培养阅读兴趣与习惯。不留课后作业。

陪伴・经典・华语・思辨

一对一・P3–P4・线上 Zoom・SGD 50 / 小时・免费试课 30–45 分钟

Short videos train children to scroll. AI does their writing. But no one is teaching them to think.

One hour at a time, I read a classic with your child — in Mandarin. We talk. We question. Your child uses AI to turn their ideas into something genuinely theirs. No homework.

Companionship · Classics · Chinese · Critical Thinking

1-on-1 · P3–P4 · Online via Zoom · SGD 50/hr · Free trial 30–45 min

了解更多・Learn More 💬 WhatsApp
